title: Routines
noRoutines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

created.title: Routine created
created.withTrigger: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
created.noAgent: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.

updateFailed.title: Failed to update routine
updateFailed.body: Paperclip could not update the routine.

runFailed.title: Routine run failed
runFailed.body: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

agentRequired.title: Default agent required
agentRequired.body: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.

schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.skipMissed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
schedule.enqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
